posts.author: Arockiya_Raja
posts.text: Slicing order in Sensex F&O Contracts — Auto-slicing is not supported for GTT orders at the moment. This is on our to-do.

posts.author: Priyanka_Rai
posts.text: Slicing order in Sensex F&O Contracts — @Meher_Smaran @Arockiya_Raja If we place a regular order with a quantity higher than the freeze limit, it gets sliced automatically. If we set GTT stop-loss and target orders as well, will those orders also get sliced automatically.
